title: スマートファルコン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Smart Falcon and I begin our challenge of
competing in the Twinkle Series at last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a stunningly fine day, perfect for new
beginnings. I take my time getting ready and am
about to head out, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding dong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding dong! Ding dong! Ding dong!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! ☆ Don't tell me you forgot the chant!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Smart and stunning no matter how fast she
flies! ☆ It's everyone's favorite—Faaalco! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We're starting training today, aren't we? I was so
excited, I couldn't sit still! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Let's go already, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's only one place for an Umadol to go! And
that is...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Good morning! ☆ Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My Umadol performance is about to begin! How
about a shot of Umadol energy to start your day
off on the right foot? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has led me down to the river, where
it appears she performs daily.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: What's an... "Umadol"?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Beats me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's a fantastic question!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: An Umadol is a brand-new type of idol! A dazzlingly brilliant Umamusume who shines brightly on the stage and the racecourse! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I sing here every day 'cause I'm aiming to be a top
Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: O-oh, I see...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Stick around and listen if you can! The best seats
in the house are yours for the taking—
Squeee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, go away! You're attracting too much
attention!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huhhh?! Why don't you go away? I'm just getting some coffee!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't try and act all cool! You can't even drink
coffee!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whaaat?! O-of course I can! In fact, I even
drink it black!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! Daiwa Scarlet and Vodka are
bickering again!
Awww, they're so cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you hear that? Vodka and Daiwa Scarlet
are having one of their famous fights! Let's check
it out!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey! W-wait, don't leave!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No way... ☆ Their argument attracted more
attention than my performance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remind her that Daiwa Scarlet and Vodka are
two of the favorites to do well in the Classics this
year. It's inevitable that they draw attention.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The Classics... G1 races, all on turf...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's all the more reason why I can't lose!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We're continuing the performance! Even if
nobody listens...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I just know that my song will reach their hearts! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Lalalaaa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of her singing all alone reminds me of
when I first met her. Singing her heart out as if to
yell "look at me!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She looked as if she was shining.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Nobody showed up today either...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, a little disappointed... But it's no
biggie!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm actually feeling motivated! An Umadol shines
brightest under pressure!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And the more hurdles I have to clear, the brighter
I'll shine!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And besides—there's no way I can let myself get
down at this stage! Not when I remember my
dream!
choice_data_list: To become dirt racing's top Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll start by making dirt races the greatest in
the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classics, the Arima Kinen, the Japan Cup, the
Tenno Sho... All the biggest races are held on
turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The raw power on display in dirt races still draws
many fans, but to a much lesser extent. Out of all
the central G1 races, only two are on dirt.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It won't be easy to outshine all the turf runners
and become a top Umadol through dirt racing
alone.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I'm already committed! I'm gonna keep my
eyes on the road ahead and run till I reach the
top! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Plus, my first fan will always be here by my side,
right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as we're reaffirming Smart Falcon's dream of
becoming a top Umadol through dirt racing...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: Wait, is the performance over?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Are you...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who always sings here, right? I'm
always cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text:
I had some time today, so I came to watch you!
But... are you already done?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer!
choice_data_list: There's still time for an encore, don't you think?
There's still time for an encore, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: There sure is! ☆ We're not done yet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's sing one more song! This one goes out to
you, my special fan! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So begins Smart Falcon's dream of becoming a
top Umadol—a dream which may one day become
legend.
